message: br-franken_networkx-57c0: support find_cycle source and orientation

files.patch:
@@ -3036,7 +3036,7 @@ def __dir__(self):
 # Algorithm functions — cycles
 from franken_networkx._fnx import (
     simple_cycles,
-    find_cycle,
+    find_cycle as _raw_find_cycle,
     girth,
     find_negative_cycle,
 )
@@ -3054,6 +3054,17 @@ def __dir__(self):
 )
 
 
+def find_cycle(G, source=None, orientation=None):
+    if source is not None or orientation is not None:
+        return _call_networkx_for_parity(
+            "find_cycle",
+            G,
+            source=source,
+            orientation=orientation,
+        )
+    return _raw_find_cycle(G)
+
+
 def _make_list_of_ints(sequence):
     if not isinstance(sequence, list):
         result = []

@@ -1074,7 +1074,11 @@ def is_perfect_matching(g: Graph, matching: list[tuple[Any, Any]]) -> bool: ...
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 def simple_cycles(g: DiGraph) -> list[list[Any]]: ...
-def find_cycle(g: Union[Graph, DiGraph]) -> list[tuple[Any, Any]]: ...
+def find_cycle(
+    g: Union[Graph, DiGraph],
+    source: Any = ...,
+    orientation: Optional[str] = ...,
+) -> list[tuple[Any, Any] | tuple[Any, Any, str]]: ...
 def girth(g: Graph) -> Optional[int]: ...
 def find_negative_cycle(g: Graph, source: Any, weight: str = "weight") -> list[Any]: ...

@@ -756,3 +756,22 @@ def test_no_cycle_raises(self):
         G.add_edge(1, 2)
         with pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXNoCycle):
             fnx.find_cycle(G)
+
+    def test_source_and_orientation_match_networkx(self, nx):
+        for graph_type in ("Graph", "DiGraph"):
+            G_fnx = getattr(fnx, graph_type)()
+            G_nx = getattr(nx, graph_type)()
+            for u, v in ((0, 1), (1, 2), (2, 0)):
+                G_fnx.add_edge(u, v)
+                G_nx.add_edge(u, v)
+
+            assert fnx.find_cycle(G_fnx, source=1) == nx.find_cycle(G_nx, source=1)
+            assert fnx.find_cycle(G_fnx, orientation="original") == nx.find_cycle(
+                G_nx, orientation="original"
+            )
+            assert fnx.find_cycle(G_fnx, orientation="ignore") == nx.find_cycle(
+                G_nx, orientation="ignore"
+            )
+            assert fnx.find_cycle(
+                G_fnx, source=1, orientation="original"
+            ) == nx.find_cycle(G_nx, source=1, orientation="original")
